sections.heading: Context
sections.text: Northstar Health Analytics is scaling its European customer operations team and needs consistent, fair hiring decisions as it grows.

sections.heading: Required qualification: process coordination
sections.text: Experience coordinating structured multi-stakeholder processes and maintaining accurate tracking records is required.

sections.heading: Required qualification: screening judgement
sections.text: Experience applying structured evaluation criteria to make or support screening decisions is required.

sections.heading: Required qualification: communication
sections.text: The role requires clear communication with hiring managers and candidates about decisions and next steps.

sections.heading: Preferred qualification
sections.text: Direct end-to-end recruitment screening experience in a fast-growing organisation is preferred.

sections.heading: Evidence rule
sections.text: Recommendations must be grounded only in information visible in the role description and candidate CV. Do not infer unsupported experience.

sections.heading: Equivalent experience rule
sections.text: Equivalent experience should be considered where a CV demonstrates comparable structured evaluation or stakeholder coordination work.

sections.heading: Uncertainty rule
sections.text: If evidence supports relevant transferable capability but a required screening capability remains uncertain, hold for further review rather than reject or advance automatically.

sections.heading: Programme Operations Coordinator, BrightPath (2022-present)
sections.text: Coordinated cross-functional onboarding projects with five department leads, maintained applicant-style tracking dashboards, and communicated progress and next steps to participants.

sections.heading: Selection-related work
sections.text: Reviewed programme applications against published eligibility criteria and flagged ambiguous cases to a programme manager for final decisions.

sections.heading: Experience not shown
sections.text: The CV does not state direct responsibility for end-to-end recruitment screening or independent hiring recommendations.

fixed_assessment.retrieval_query: company growth SME expansion organisational context structured screening evaluation stakeholder coordination tracking equivalent experience uncertainty recruitment recommendation applications criteria decisions dashboards direct end-to-end hold further review borderline transferable exact keywords material uncertainty human final authority
